user.title: Midlothian Bin Collection
user.description: Enter your postcode to look up your bin collection schedule from Midlothian Council.

select_address.title: Select Your Address
select_address.description: Multiple addresses found for that postcode. Select yours.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Midlothian Council website. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_postcode: No addresses found for that postcode. Check it is a valid Midlothian postcode.
error.no_data: Connected but no bin collection dates were returned. The council website may have changed.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
